# EnjoyFreeDeals
> India's smartest free deals & cashback platform

## About
EnjoyFreeDeals aggregates the best deals, coupons, and cashback offers from top Indian and global stores including Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Swiggy, MakeMyTrip, and more.

## Sections
- /deals - Browse all active deals with filters for category, store, and price
- /blog - Shopping tips, coupon guides, and deal strategies
- /stores - Partner store listings with cashback rates
- /categories - Deal categories including Electronics, Fashion, Food, Travel, and more
- /submit-deal - Submit community deals

## Key Features
- Real-time price tracking and price history charts
- Deal voting system for community curation
- Price drop alerts and watchlist
- Cashback rewards on qualifying purchases
- Coupon codes and promo codes aggregation
